title: 扶阳化脓灸理论到实践转化工具包 - source notes
core_user_material: 用户上传的《粘贴的文本 (1).txt》，包含关于化脓灸的疫苗效应、扶阳效应、常用穴位、具体操作、局部脓液、灸后护理等论述。

public_sources.name: Safety of Moxibustion: A Systematic Review of Case Reports
public_sources.use: 不良事件、烧伤/感染/过敏/烟雾等风险

public_sources.name: Adverse events of moxibustion: a systematic review
public_sources.use: 不良事件类型和风险边界

public_sources.name: WHO benchmarks for the practice of acupuncture
public_sources.use: 针灸服务基础设施、安全实践与从业规范参考

public_sources.name: WHO Vaccines and immunization: What is vaccination?
public_sources.use: 疫苗概念、特异性免疫训练，与‘疫苗效应’类比纠偏

public_sources.name: CDC Explaining How Vaccines Work
public_sources.use: 疫苗通过模拟感染训练免疫系统，不等于灸疮造成的非特异炎症

public_sources.name: The Mechanism of Moxibustion: Ancient Theory and Modern Research
public_sources.use: 热效应、辐射效应、艾及燃烧产物的现代机制研究

public_sources.name: Moxibustion for Essential Hypertension and Hypertensive Symptoms: A Systematic Review of 18 RCTs
public_sources.use: 高血压方向证据等级：可能作为辅助但证据质量有限

public_sources.name: Moxibustion for cancer care: a systematic review and meta-analysis
public_sources.use: 肿瘤支持治疗证据：恶心呕吐等有限，不支持抗癌根治宣称

public_sources.name: NCI Infection and Neutropenia during Cancer Treatment
public_sources.use: 肿瘤治疗/中性粒低下人群感染风险

public_sources.name: NICE Blood Transfusion - Platelet thresholds and targets
public_sources.use: 侵入性操作常参考血小板 >50×10^9/L 的安全底线

evidence_note: PWA中的证据分级为面向实务的粗分级，不替代系统评价或临床指南。
